scripts.start:workspace: concurrently -n app,slides,docker,gateway -c blue,cyan,magenta,green "npm run start:app" "npm run start:slides" "npm run start:docker" "npm run start:gateway"
scripts.restart: npm run kill:ports && npm run start:workspace
